introSection:
Choco Chip Creek is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. The ride was built by Vekoma.

The addition of Choco Chip Creek was announced in October 2021. The coaster was part of a new themed area called Sweet Valley. It opened with Sweet Valley on 27 April 2024.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 36 riders per train.

fullText:
Choco Chip Creek is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. The ride was built by Vekoma.

The addition of Choco Chip Creek was announced in October 2021. The coaster was part of a new themed area called Sweet Valley. It opened with Sweet Valley on 27 April 2024.



3 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 36 riders per train.
